hooks.command: cmd="$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty')"; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|]+)[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$|[;&|])'; then echo '↻ git push detected — running bin/ci' >&2; if bin/ci >&2; then exit 0; else echo 'bin/ci FAILED after the push — it is NOT done until CI is green; investigate and fix before continuing.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
